Class SomaticCore

java.lang.Object
MyGame.GameObject.Weapon.Weapon
MyGame.GameObject.Weapon.Cores.SomaticCore
All Implemented Interfaces:
Renderable
public class SomaticCore extends Weapon
A core upgrade that enhances physical attributes and recovery.
